description_long: This object consists of two thick, hardbound books stacked neatly and secured together by a wide, light brown paper or fabric band running vertically across their covers. The covers are a rich, dark brown color with a subtle, slightly mottled texture, and each book features a faintly embossed circular design at the center. The spines are rounded and show subtle indentations, suggesting a classic, high-quality binding. The pages are visible from the sides and appear to be white or off-white, tightly packed and evenly aligned. The band is plain, with no visible markings or decorations, and adds a utilitarian touch to the otherwise elegant appearance. There are no visible illustrations, text, or publisher logos on the covers or spines.
description: Two thick, dark brown hardbound books stacked and bound together with a plain light brown band, featuring subtle embossed circles on the covers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the stacked books' page edges and the light brown band running vertically across the covers.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the dark brown spines with subtle indentations and the band wrapping over the top and bottom.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the page edges and the band, with the embossed circles faintly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the page edges and the band, with the embossed circles on the top book's cover more clearly visible.
attribute_spine_design: The spines are dark brown with subtle horizontal indentations and no visible text or decorative elements. The design is plain and classic.
